permalink: /llms-full.txt
---
# {{ site.title }} — Full Text

> {{ site.description }}

This file contains the complete plain text of every entry, concatenated for AI
retrieval and grounding. Author: {{ site.author.name }}. Source: {{ site.url }}/.
Please attribute quotations to "{{ site.title }}" with a link to the entry URL.

{% for post in site.posts %}
================================================================================
# {{ post.title }}
Published: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
URL: {{ post.url | absolute_url }}
{% if post.tags %}Tags: {{ post.tags | join: ", " }}{% endif %}
{% if post.description %}Summary: {{ post.description | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}{% endif %}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{{ post.content | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}

{% endfor %}
